title: fraxinus ornus var. argentea
intro: Fraxinus ornus var. argentea, also known as the silver ash or white ash, is a variety of the common ash tree (Fraxinus ornus) characterized by its greyish-white bark and leaves. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus ornus var. argentea include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Fraxinus ornus var. argentea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
